headline: Is It Time To Reassess Gartner (IT) After A 64% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Gartner's current share price still reflects its underlying value, it helps to step back and look closely at what the recent numbers and valuation checks are actually saying. The stock last closed at US$143.72, with returns of a 9.0% decline over 7 days, a 13.8% decline over 30 days, a 39.4% decline year to date, and a 64.1% decline over the past year. This naturally raises questions about how risk and potential reward are now being priced in. Recent news...

headline: The middle manager cuts saving you millions today will cost you everything in 2028
summary: Flattening your org chart saves real money today. But you just eliminated the only system that actually developed your next generation of leaders.
